notes: (1) Audio file is now read fully into RAM as an ArrayBuffer-backed Blob before being handed to the audio element. Symptom of the old behavior: the playback clock advanced but no sound — typical of Android Chrome revoking the underlying FileSystemFileHandle mid-playback while the streaming Blob URL is still bound to <audio>. The in-memory Blob severs that dependency. (2) Added a live audio-state indicator under the now-playing label that surfaces lifecycle events (loading / buffering / stalled / error). If audio cuts out, the indicator shows what state the element is in. SW cache bumped to v5.
